title: rubus × simillimus
intro: Rubus × simillimus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or black raspberry, is a plant species that results from the cross-breeding of Rubus idaeus and Rubus occidentalis. The medicinal properties of Rubus × simillimus lie in its high content of anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × simillimus include its potential to reduce the risk of certain cancers, improve cardiovascular health, and provide protection against neurodegenerative diseases. Rubus × simillimus is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be consumed fresh or dried to reap its medicinal and nutritional benefits.
